Container.Name: monitor-agent
Container.Overview: Monitor Agent pushes host metrics (CPU, memory, network, array disks, ZFS pools, and Docker containers) to your Monitor dashboard. Requires an ingest token from https://monitor.fascinated.cc This template runs with host networking, privileged mode, and host /proc mounts so metrics reflect your Unraid server—not only the container. Array shares under /mnt/*, ZFS, and Docker stats are supported when left at the default volume mappings.
Container.Requires: Monitor ingest token. Docker must be enabled on the host for container metrics.

Config.Name: Ingest Token
Config.Description: Ingest token from your Monitor server settings (required).

Config.Name: Push Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule with seconds field (default: every 15 seconds).

Config.Name: Enable Docker Stats
Config.Description: Collect per-container CPU and memory from the host Docker daemon.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Agent log level: debug, info, warn, or error.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Leave empty to use the Unraid system timezone.

Config.Name: Config File
Config.Description: Set to - to configure via environment variables only.

Config.Name: Host Root Prefix
Config.Description: Path prefix for host disk metrics (must match the Host Root volume target).

Config.Name: Host Root
Config.Description: Host filesystem (read-only) for disk usage on array shares and ZFS mount points.

Config.Name: Host /proc
Config.Description: Host procfs for CPU, memory, load, and network metrics.

Config.Name: Host /dev
Config.Description: Host devices for disk I/O and ZFS (zpool).
